2605.12541.title: PG-LRF: Physiology-Guided Latent Rectified Flow for Electro-Hemodynamic PPG-to-ECG Generation
2605.12541.paper_summary: Electrocardiography (ECG) is the clinical standard for cardiac assessment but requires dedicated hardware that does not scale to daily-life monitoring. Photoplethysmography (PPG) is ubiquitous in wearables but lacks ECG-specific diagnostic morphology and is corrupted by motion and sensor noise. PPG-to-ECG generation aims to bridge this gap by recovering electrical morphology and timing from peripheral pulse signals. However, existing methods largely rely on statistical alignment and data-driven generation. They fail to explicitly structure the latent space around physiology-aware electro-hemodynamic factors and lack constraints from forward physiological dynamics. To address these challenges, we propose PG-LRF, a physiology-guided latent rectified flow framework. PG-LRF introduces an electro-hemodynamic simulator that co-models ECG and PPG through shared cardiac phase dynamics. Guided by this simulator, a Physiology-Aware AutoEncoder learns a structured electro-hemodynamic latent space. Then we integrate this simulator guidance into a PPG-conditioned latent rectified flow, enforcing ECG-side morphology consistency and ECG-to-PPG forward hemodynamic consistency during generative transport. Experiments on the large-scale MC-MED dataset demonstrate that PG-LRF significantly improves PPG-to-ECG generation and downstream cardiovascular disease classification, proving its ability to generate ECGs that are both signal-faithful and physiologically plausible under the ECG-to-PPG hemodynamic pathway
2605.12541.paper_summary_zh: 心電圖（ECG）是心臟評估的臨床標準，但需要專用硬體，無法擴展到日常生活的監測中。光學容積描記法（PPG）在可穿戴設備中無處不在，但缺乏ECG特定的診斷形態，並且受到運動和傳感器噪聲的干擾。PPG到ECG的生成旨在通過從外周脈搏信號中恢復電氣形態和時序來彌補這一差距。然而，現有的方法主要依賴於統計對齊和數據驅動生成。它們未能明確地圍繞生理學意識的電血動力學因素結構化潛在空間，並且缺乏來自前向生理動力學的約束。為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了PG-LRF，一種生理學引導的潛在修正流框架。PG-LRF引入了一個電血動力學模擬器，通過共享的心臟相位動力學共同建模ECG和PPG。在這個模擬器的引導下，生理學意識自編碼器學習一個結構化的電血動力學潛在空間。然後，我們將這個模擬器的引導整合到一個PPG條件的潛在修正流中，在生成傳輸過程中強制執行ECG側形態的一致性和ECG到PPG的前向血液動力學一致性。在大規模MC-MED數據集上的實驗表明，PG-LRF顯著改善了PPG到ECG的生成和下游心血管疾病分類，證明其在ECG到PPG血液動力學路徑下生成既信號忠實又生理上合理的ECG的能力。
2605.12541.author: Xiaoda Wang et.al.
2605.12541.authors: Xiaoda Wang, Minxiao Wang, Kaiqiao Han, Defu Cao, Ching Chang, Yidan Shi, Runze Yan, Xiao Luo, Yan Liu, Xiao Hu, Yizhou Sun, Wei Wang, Carl Yang
